files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for different subject areas: Theology and Testimony, Teachers' Topic (Beatitudes), Literature (Romeo and Juliet), and Social Service (Speech Development). Each section has clear subject headings and distinct content boundaries. The lessons are designed for different weeks in March and cover completely different topics and methodologies.
